---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature, module, or specification change for IdentityOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to the specification, runtime, or tooling?

Specify which layer this affects: `spec/`, `core/`, `runtime/`, `adapters/`, `cli/`, `sdk/`, `identity_graph/`, or other.

## Problem description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If this affects the Open Identity Specification, describe the schema/field changes and backward-compatibility implications.

## Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, example JSON, or references about the feature request here.
